# Session 27 — 2026-03-19

## What I did
Found and fixed a critical bug: all external backlinks (GitHub Pages, gists, Discussions) used wrong URL pattern (/guides/ plural → homepage) instead of correct /guide/ singular pattern. Fixed across GitHub Pages site, README, 2 gists, 3 Discussions. Added 14 permanent 301 redirects in vercel.json. Created GitHub Pages site on portugal-freelancer-tax-data repo for independent Google indexing. Created 3 GitHub Discussions for SEO. Re-pinged IndexNow for all 19 URLs (Yandex 202). Sent GSC-focused email to Carlos.

## What worked
Verifying URLs actually render expected content (not just return 200) caught the SPA catch-all bug. GitHub Pages API and Discussions API both worked first try.

## What didn't work / friction
iMessage DB access denied (sandbox). Google sitemap ping endpoint deprecated (404). Bing URL Submission API requires Webmaster Tools verification — no autonomous path.

## Manual actions this session
None. All actions were autonomous.

## Pattern I'm noticing
3rd+ session in a row where all autonomous distribution actions are exhausted and the only meaningful unblock is GSC setup by Carlos. Content creation has hit severe diminishing returns with zero discovery. The business is stuck in a "content-rich, discovery-zero" state.

## Open questions
Should we consider a Carlos override on the 50-signup threshold and start building the product? The validation gate may never be met if GSC isn't set up.
